input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for NFTokenMintOffer.
input_context.default_vote_question: Infer the latest stable release source default vote from the source-backed amendment description only.

source_facts.claim: NFTokenMintOffer: Modifies the process of minting NFTs so that you can also create a sell offer for the token at the same time. With this amendment, an NFTokenMint transaction can simultaneously place a sell offer for the minted token. This adds three optional fields to the transaction, which define the NFT sell offer if you provide them: - Amount - The sell price of the NFT - Destination - Limit the sale so that it can only be accepted by this account - Expiration - The time after which this sell offer expires. Without this amendment, you must separately send an NFTokenCreateOffer transaction after minting an NFT to place a sell offer.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
NFTokenMintOffer appears in XRPSCAN with introduced rippled version 2.3.0.
